user.title: Nebula VPN
user.description: Configure the Nebula VPN metrics endpoint.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Nebula metrics endpoint. Check the URL and that Nebula is running with the `stats:` block enabled.
error.invalid_auth: The Nebula metrics endpoint rejected the request (401/403).
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Nebula endpoint is already configured.

get_metrics.name: Get metrics
get_metrics.description: Returns the full parsed Prometheus document from the Nebula metrics endpoint for templating and debugging.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry to query. Omit when only one Nebula instance is configured.
